overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, following a pedestrian beneath elevated highway ramps. The scene features wet pavement reflections, neon signage, and futuristic architecture typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway ramps with neon-lit buildings

events.description: dark pickup truck drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a red jacket along the wet sidewalk beneath highway overpasses

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing a red jacket and dark pants
dark pickup truck driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with metal railings spanning across the road
light blue guard rail running along the sidewalk edge
tall building column with glowing red and orange neon lights
tropical palm trees lining the far side of the road
tall illuminated digital sign on the sidewalk ahead
tall modern building with dark reflective facade
multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines reflecting street lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath massive highway overpasses in a futuristic city at night. The camera follows a pedestrian in a red jacket while a dark truck passes on the adjacent multi-lane road. Neon lights reflect off wet surfaces and illuminate the dark glass buildings lining the street.

events.description: camera passes the pedestrian on the right and continues forward

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the pedestrian, approaching the digital kiosk and overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pedestrian, the camera continues toward a digital advertising kiosk beneath the looming highway ramps. The surrounding buildings and palm trees fall behind as the overpass structure dominates the view ahead, with the neon-lit pillar now passing by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that shifts from a crowded urban corridor to a focused view of futuristic infrastructure. It begins by following a pedestrian in a red jacket along a wet sidewalk, while a dark truck glides past on an adjacent road beneath massive highway overpasses. As the camera moves forward, the neon reflections from dark glass buildings and street lights shimmer across the pavement. The scene then shifts as the pedestrian is left behind, and the surrounding palm trees and architecture recede into the background. Finally, the camera advances toward a digital advertising kiosk, with the looming concrete pillars of the highway ramps dominating the frame.
